name: Getting Paid for Open Source Work
description: Sustain your work in open source by getting financial support for your time or your project.
author: GitHub
learningObjectives:
After this lesson, the learner should be able to:
- Articulate why financial support matters for open source sustainability
- Identify strategies for funding personal open source contributions
- Find and apply for project-level funding sources
- Build a case for financial support from employers or sponsors
abstract: A guide for contributors and maintainers on achieving financial sustainability in open source. Covers personal funding strategies, project-level funding sources, building a case for support, and experimenting with different models.
audience: Maintainers, Project Leads, Research Software Engineers
teaches: Identify and pursue financial sustainability strategies for open source work
